# BWK Digital Solutions

> Technology Should Solve Problems, Not Create Them.

BWK Digital Solutions is a digital consultancy that helps businesses solve technology problems through automation, integration, web development, and AI. Founded by Bret Kramer and based in Little Rock, Arkansas, serving clients nationwide.

## Services

- **Automation**: Automated workflows for repetitive tasks — email sequences, data entry, invoicing, customer onboarding, report generation
- **Integration**: Connecting business systems so data flows seamlessly — CRM to email, e-commerce to accounting, custom API connections
- **Development**: Websites and web applications — new builds, redesigns, mobile-responsive, e-commerce, landing pages
- **AI Leverage**: Practical AI implementation — chatbots, content workflows, data analysis, document processing, AI strategy consulting

## Contact

- Website: https://bwkdigitalsolutions.com
- Email: info@bwkdigitalsolutions.com
- Location: Little Rock, Arkansas (serving clients nationwide)
